title: ZimaBoard 2 Review: Set Up Your Own AI Server (And Run OpenClaw!)
summary: Jordan Urbs reviews the ZimaBoard 2, a paperback-sized personal server for running local AI applications. He demonstrates setting up OpenClaw (a forked implementation of Cloud Code), connecting it to Venice AI, and building a Telegram bot that provides daily AI news briefings using Apify for web scraping. The setup achieves sovereign, self-hosted AI without cloud dependencies or vendor lock-in.
